examples: They beheld a bright star shining in the sky.
Running in, she beheld a pile of books and papers on the floor, with the table-cover on top.
Suddenly she looked back and beheld such glory as she had not even seen in her most vivid dream.
Flipping the Ultra over, we beheld a black, smooth semi-glossy exterior with a solid plastic build.
We're just as drawn to its beauty as we were when we first beheld the One X with our own eyes.
